subject: Fermi  trigger No 729650855: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, V.Kornilov, E. Gorbovskoy, K. Zhirkov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, V.Senik,  D. Vlasenko,
G.Antipov, D.Zimnukhov, E.Minkina, A.Chasovnikov, V.Topolev, D.Kuvshinov, D. Cheryasov, Ya.Kechin, Yu.Tselik, A. Sosnovskij
(Lomonosov Moscow State University, SAI, Physics Department),

R. Podesta, C.Lopez, F. Podesta, C.Francile
(Observatorio Astronomico Felix Aguilar OAFA),

(The Instituto de Astrofisica de Canarias),

(Irkutsk State University, API),

L.Carrasco, J.R.Valdes, V.Chavushyan, V.M.Patino Alvarez, J.Martinez,
A.R.Corella, L.H.Rodriguez
(INAOE, Guillermo Haro Astrophysics Observatory),

A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov
(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)

MASTER-Kislovodsk robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, Kislovodsk Solar Station of Pulkovo observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB240215.03 (trigger No 729650855,21h 14m 12.00s , -00d 42m 00.0s, R=32.95) errorbox  6261 sec after notice time and 6304 sec after trigger time at 2024-02-15 02:32:34 UT, with upper limit up to  16.4 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 67 deg. The sun  altitude  is -18.3 deg. 

MASTER-Tunka robotic telescope  located in Russia (Applied Physics Institute, Irkutsk State University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB240215.03 errorbox  42196 sec after notice time and 42239 sec after trigger time at 2024-02-15 12:31:29 UT, with upper limit up to  17.7 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 80 deg. The sun  altitude  is -21.0 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -32 deg., longitude l = 51 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2378800

We obtain a following upper limits.  

Tmid-T0  |      Date Time      |          Site       |             Coord (J2000)          |Filt.| Expt. | Limit| Comment
_________|_____________________|_____________________|____________________________________|_____|_______|_______|________

    6335 | 2024-02-15 02:32:34 |   MASTER-Kislovodsk | (19h 10m 54.83s , +05d 06m 49.9s) |   C |    60 | 16.4 |        
   42269 | 2024-02-15 12:31:29 |        MASTER-Tunka | (23h 14m 19.86s , +11d 07m 18.5s) |   C |    60 | 17.7 |        
Filter C is a clear (unfiltred) band. 


The observation and reduction will continue. 
The message may be cited.
